# P8.1H.1 Cloud Template RunId Policy Inventory

GeneratedUtc: 2026-05-24T20:01:14.5770306Z

This inventory checks cloud deployment templates for the debug-only SQL operational RunId override.

## Container Apps settings template

Present.
- Contains debug-only RunId setting: no
- Contains: `MIGRATION_ConnectionStrings__MigrationOperationalStore`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__Enabled`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__WorkerId`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__BatchSize`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__LeaseSeconds`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__PollDelaySeconds`
- Contains: `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__RunUntilIdleAndStop`

## Policy

- `MIGRATION_SqlOperationalQueueExecutor__RunId` is debug-only.
- Cloud workers should discover runnable runs from SQL with `RunIdOverride=(null)`.
- Keep `SqlOperationalQueueExecutor:RunId` only in short-lived user-secrets/local debug sessions.
